_comment: Supercharged Memory configuration. Edit these values to customize behavior.

memory_md._comment: Controls for MEMORY.md — the curated long-term memory file.

daily_notes._comment: Controls for daily session log files (memory/YYYY-MM-DD.md).

consolidation._comment: How often the agent reviews daily notes and promotes content to MEMORY.md.

qmd._comment: QMD search engine settings. Collections are auto-discovered.

vector_db._comment: Optional Mem0/Qdrant upgrade. Set enabled=true after completing the upgrade setup.

health_check._comment: Thresholds for the daily health check.

session_start._comment: Files loaded during the boot sequence. Order matters.
